# 12.2. Gitグラフ（マルチブランチ）

~~~mermaid
gitGraph
    commit
    branch develop
    checkout develop
    commit
    commit
    checkout main
    merge develop
    commit
    branch feature
    checkout feature
    commit
    commit
    checkout main
    merge feature
~~~
